extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked final mountain time trial to overcome 57-second deficit, destroying ROGLIČ by 1:56 to steal yellow on penultimate stage.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR reversed 40-second deficit between checkpoint 2 and 3, revealing explosive climbing capacity in final kilometers of mountain TTs.
ROGLIČ held yellow 11 days with team support but cracked when isolated, exposing fundamental weakness in solo climbing efforts.
UAE Emirates structured entire tour around single rider superiority rather than team domestique strength, validating skeleton-crew GC approach.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: At 21 captured yellow/polka dot/white/stage simultaneously, demonstrating unprecedented multi-discipline dominance in single ITT effort
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost 1:56 on mountain ITT despite holding yellow 11 days, revealing catastrophic time trial weakness against pure climbers
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: neutral: Started 22 seconds behind LANDA fighting for podium position, career-defining final podium photo opportunity at stake
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost polka dot jersey despite coasting early ITT kilometers, unable to defend KOM lead against POGAČAR's climbing speed
